page_chunk: Return eligibility: Most items can be returned within a 30-day window from the delivery date. Items must be in original packaging and in resellable condition. Electronics must include all accessories, cables, and manuals. Final-sale items and downloadable software are non-returnable. Furniture is covered by a 30-day comfort guarantee.

Return process: Start a return to receive an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number, typically issued within 1 business day. A prepaid shipping label is provided. Returns are free for defective items; non-defective returns incur a $7.99 return shipping fee. Large or freight items are scheduled for pickup.

Refunds: Once received and inspected, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days; credit card refunds may take an additional 3-5 days to post. A restocking fee of up to 15% may apply if an item is returned damaged. Customers may instead choose an exchange for 110% of the value in store credit.

Return exceptions: Holiday purchases have an extended return window through January 31. Manufacturer warranty claims are handled beyond the 30-day window. Bulk or wholesale orders qualify for a 20% consideration with manager approval. International returns are shipped at the customer's expense. A 14-day price match is available on eligible items.
